title: MSt-50 Mass Driver Cannon
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:MassDriver-FoC.jpg|thumb|An MSt-50 on standby.]]

The '''MSt-50 Mass Driver Cannon''' was a type of turret used by the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They fired solid metal slugs at a tremendous speed and could thus penetrate [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2006-10-24 -->[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption Expansion'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
